question: How variable are monthly temperature maxima from year to year in Amherst—do some years show more extreme fluctuations than others?

analysis.design_rationale: A boxplot for each year displays the distribution and range of monthly maxima within that year. This allows direct visual comparison of spread, median, and outliers year-by-year—immediately revealing whether certain years have more extreme fluctuation (larger interquartile range, longer whiskers, and/or more outliers). Boxplots are highly effective for showcasing variability and extremes within groupings, and are particularly well-suited for showing potential anomalous or highly variable years over 12 consecutive years.
analysis.target_insight: Which years had the most/least month-to-month temperature variability, and whether any years stand out with extreme temperature highs or lows.

chart_encodings.color: Year (mapped to colormap for visual distinction)
chart_encodings.other_aesthetics: Show outliers as points; horizontal gridlines; rotate x-labels; use distinct color per box via colormap

transformations: Group all rows by df['Year'] so that each group contains the 12 monthly maxima for that year
data_preparation_steps: Sort df by df['Year'] ascending for chronological x-axis ordering
Extract the list of unique years from df['Year'] to map colors
suggestion.matplotlib_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib as mpl
df = pd.read_csv('csv_c_squared\461.csv')
df = df.sort_values('Year')
years = df['Year'].unique()
data_per_year = [df[df['Year'] == year]['Temperature'].values for year in years]
cmap = mpl.colormaps['viridis']
colors = [cmap(i / (len(years) - 1)) for i in range(len(years))]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 6))
box = ax.boxplot(data_per_year, positions=np.arange(len(years)), patch_artist=True, showfliers=True)
for patch, color in zip(box['boxes'], colors):
    patch.set_facecolor(color)
for median in box['medians']:
    median.set_linewidth(2)
    median.set_color('black')
ax.set_xticks(np.arange(len(years)))
ax.set_xticklabels([str(int(y)) for y in years], rotation=45)
ax.set_xlabel('Year', fontsize=12)
ax.set_ylabel('Monthly Max Temperature (°F)', fontsize=12)
ax.set_title('Distribution of Monthly Maxima by Year\nAmherst 2004-2015', fontsize=14)
ax.grid(axis='y', linestyle='--', alpha=0.6)
norm = mpl.colors.Normalize(vmin=years.min(), vmax=years.max())
sm = plt.cm.ScalarMappable(cmap=cmap, norm=norm)
sm.set_array([])
cbar = plt.colorbar(sm, ax=ax, orientation='vertical', pad=0.02)
cbar.set_label('Year', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
